name: XOR Matrix
input:
The first line contains one integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 10^4$) — the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of one line containing four integers $n, m, A, B$ ($2 \le n, m, A, B \le 2^{29} - 1$).
output: For each test case, output one integer — the number of pairs of arrays $(a, b)$ that satisfy all three conditions. Since this number can be very large, output it modulo $998244353$.
